title: Ajay
subTitle: Manorama falls in love with Ajay, even though they come from different social backgrounds. They want to get married, but Manorama's uncles try their best to separate the happy couple.

title: Dil Ka Kya Kasoor
subTitle: A rich girl, Shalini, falls in love with an orphan, Arun, after he performs the poems she wrote using a pen name. However, things take a tragic turn when Arun marries the principal's daughter, Meena.

title: Vikram Vetal
subTitle: King Vikramaditya is told twenty-five stories by a ghost, Vetal. He must find a moral lesson in each of these stories.

title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Ravi Kapoor, a police officer and Sonu Dada, a former criminal, join hands together to take down a notorious gangster, Chandi Das.

title: Police Aur Mujrim
subTitle: After DSP Vishal arrests two thugs, their boss kidnaps the commissioner's daughter. But after Vishal rescues the girl and jails the thugs, they return to hurt Vishal and the commissioner's families.

title: Teri Meherbaniyan
subTitle: Ram, an honest man, falls in love with a woman named Bijli and goes on to help the people of her village. However, the region's corrupt leader, Thakur Vijay Singh, soon begins to plot against him.

title: Rowdy Rakshak
subTitle: A special agent is assigned to protect the prime minister, who later gets assassinated. He is tasked with finding the group responsible for the assassination.

title: Mere Sajna Saath Nibhana
subTitle: Kanhaiya, a poor street performer, falls in love with Chanchal, a wealthy woman. He convinces his mother to ask for her hand in marriage, but things take a turn when Chanchal's father insults her.

title: Real Tevar
subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: Game Changer
subTitle: A principled IAS officer battles systemic corruption, championing fair elections to uphold democratic integrity amidst political machinations.

title: Mard Ki Zabaan
subTitle: The lives of brothers Ram and Lakshman are irrevocably changed when Ram marries Raghupati's daughter, triggering a series of events that lead to loss and lamentation.

title: Mard Ki Zabaan
subTitle: The lives of brothers Ram and Lakshman are irrevocably changed when Ram marries Raghupati's daughter, triggering a series of events that lead to loss and lamentation.

title: Platform
subTitle: Vikram and Raju are brothers who work in a restaurant. When a conniving person frames Vikram in a murder case and separates them, circumstances lead Raju to a life of crime.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Ganga Tere Desh Mein
subTitle: After arresting and institutionalising a notorious criminal who has lost his mental faculties, inspector Ajay finds his mother feeding the criminal. But when he digs deeper he uncovers a tragic truth.

title: Khoon Bhari Maang
subTitle: Widowed Aarti falls prey to Sanjay's vicious plan of getting married to him. Later, with the help of her best friend Nandini, he drowns Aarti and seizes her wealth but she survives and seeks revenge.

title: Vaishnavi
subTitle: Born with the divine power, Vaishnavi receives treatment as a goddess by the villagers. After getting killed, she possesses the body of another girl who looks like her to exact revenge for her death.

title: Kasam Hindustan Ki
subTitle: Dhuruvan is a forest ranger who trains NCC cadets. On a trek with five college girls, he stumbles upon a gang of terrorists who plan to foil a rocket launch by ISRO.

title: Judaai
subTitle: Shashikant and Gauri get married in honour of his late father's will. But, marital problems soon arise when Gauri suspects him of having an affair, leading to a chain of misunderstandings.

title: Haathkadi
subTitle: ACP Suraj, an honest policeman, swears revenge on culprits when his innocent brother is killed. However, he is soon accused of murder and is remanded to prison.

title: Hero No. 1
subTitle: Rajesh and Meena intend to marry each other, but her grandfather disapproves of their relationship. Soon, he poses himself as a servant and enters her home to try and win the approval of her loved one's using his wit and talent.

title: Main Tera Dushman
subTitle: When a Forest Officer, Kishan Srivastav, hinders the criminal activities of Thakur Dayalu, he is framed for murder and sent to jail. Later, Kishan escapes prison and tries to clear his name.

title: Main Tera Dushman
subTitle: When a Forest Officer, Kishan Srivastav, hinders the criminal activities of Thakur Dayalu, he is framed for murder and sent to jail. Later, Kishan escapes prison and tries to clear his name.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Khudgarz
subTitle: Sita raises her son, Bihari, and his friend Amar as her own and the two treat each other like brothers. However, Amar's father is not too fond of Bihari, and he tries to create a rift between the two.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Police Officer
subTitle: Jai, a kind-hearted policeman gets killed during one of his encounters. His twin, who is an infamous conman, decides to track down Jai's murderer.

title: Gambler
subTitle: Though Inspector Dayashanker is lazy, he unwittingly unearths a criminal conspiracy and becomes the pride of his division overnight. However, a local gangsters turn his life into a nightmare.

title: Kishen Kanhaiya
subTitle: Separated at birth, Kishen and Kanhaiya grow up in different worlds, one in opulent luxury, the other in poverty. Fate reunites them as they fight together to end injustice.

title: Jaal: The Trap
subTitle: Ajay, a commando, is forced to kidnap Anita, the home minister's daughter, to free his girlfriend Neha from the clutches of terrorists. In the process, he uncovers a shocking revelation.

title: Ab Tumhare Hawale Watan Saathiyo
subTitle: Kunal falls in love with Shweta and decides to stay in the army to get close to her but soon finds out that she is waiting for her husband Rajeev to return from war.

title: Kundan
subTitle: Thakur Shamsher Singh, a wealthy criminal, tries to befriend a newly-appointed police officer in order to gain his favour, only to find out that the policeman is immune to his tactics.

title: Judaai
subTitle: Shashikant and Gauri get married in honour of his late father's will. But, marital problems soon arise when Gauri suspects him of having an affair, leading to a chain of misunderstandings.

title: Andhaa Kanoon
subTitle: When his parents are killed by three men, Amar, Akbar and Anthony, Vijay teams up with a forest officer who was framed in a murder case to avenge their deaths.
